title: selaginella bahiensis
intro: Selaginella bahiensis, also known as Bahia spikemoss, is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, a type of spikemoss that belongs to the ancient group of vascular plants known as lycopods. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its medicinal properties such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Selaginella bahiensis include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and stems are typically dried and powdered for use in traditional medicine.
